inputs.label: Shift Length
inputs.businessContext: Duration of a single work shift in hours.

inputs.label: Consecutive Shifts
inputs.businessContext: Number of consecutive work days without a day off.

inputs.label: Rest Between Shifts
inputs.businessContext: Average rest time between end of one shift and start of next.

inputs.label: Noise Level
inputs.businessContext: Average workplace noise exposure in decibels.

inputs.label: Workload Factor
inputs.businessContext: Physical and mental workload intensity factor (1.0 = normal, >1.0 = high).

primary.label: Adrenal Fatigue Index
primary.description: Composite score indicating risk of adrenal fatigue; higher points indicate greater risk.

breakdown.label: Shift Contribution
breakdown.description: Contribution from shift length and workload relative to rest.

breakdown.label: Environment Contribution
breakdown.description: Contribution from noise and temperature stressors.

breakdown.label: Cumulative Contribution
breakdown.description: Contribution from consecutive work days accumulation.
